masterQuality: ULTRA-AAA Professional Casino Slot Asset. Hyper-realistic 3D octane render, Cinematic studio lighting, Masterful volumetric depth with clear Ambient Occlusion. Exceptional surface detailing, perfectly beveled edges, crisp micro-finishes. Luxury commercial polish, zero blur, maximum sharpness.

symbols.character_symbols: Highest value icons: Cinematic semi-realistic 3D characters, expressive features, individual hairs/scales visible, dramatic studio lighting, floating magical particles or energy aura, extremely complex textures.
symbols.high_value_items: Premium props: Ornate 3D objects like crowns, shields, or artifacts. Meticulous material rendering (polished gold, refractive gems), high detail density, rich specular highlights, subtle ambient glow.
symbols.low_value_ranks: Standard Ranks (A, K, Q, J, 10): Stylized thematic typography, bold beveled edges, inlaid with gemstones or metallic textures, thick gold trim, consistent color coding, high readability.
symbols.special_symbols: Wild, Scatter, Bonus: High-contrast pulsing glows, shimmering motion-blurred particles, unique ornate frames (starbursts or crystalline), vibrant energy discharges, large bold clear text.
symbols.background_treatment: Consistent symbol backing: Radial gradients, transparent with inner glow, or rounded stone/metal tablets. Desaturated to ensure symbol pop-out.

pillar.structural_logic: Solid vertical volume, 3-part construction (Base, Shaft, Capital). Must match Reel Frame material 100%.
pillar.lighting_and_depth: Top-down key light, deep side shadows for Parallax depth, rim lighting on vertical edges.
pillar.detail_density: Surface micro-textures, scratches on metal, cracks in stone, relief carvings.

materialLibrary.stone: [Mat: Ancient monolithic weathered stone, deep intricate hand-carved reliefs, Sub-surface scattering, sharp beveled edges, tactical moisture/moss details]
materialLibrary.gold: [Mat: Polished high-gloss 24k solid gold, intense Anisotropic specular glints, rich realistic amber reflections, microscopic surface imperfections for realism]
materialLibrary.neon: [Mat: High-energy emissive translucent glass, internal photonic glowing cores, vibrant electric blue/magenta plasma discharge, subtle lens flares]
materialLibrary.wood: [Mat: Lacquered dark mahogany, deep three-dimensional grain textures, warm satin amber reflections, hand-polished ornate scrollwork with depth]

assetEvolution.normal: Base: Clean materials, standard lighting, no particles, standard trim.
assetEvolution.high: Evolution (+25% Detail): Added rim lighting, subtle glow, inlaid small gemstones, metallic accents.
assetEvolution.legend: Epic (+50% Detail): Intense energy aura, floating magical debris, multi-layered ornate framing, dramatic dynamic speculars.

reel_frame.hollow_logic: CRITICAL: Pure solid black hollow center (#000000), absolute emptiness in middle. Boundary must be sharp with a subtle inner emissive glow/bloom reflecting off the frame edge.
reel_frame.border_construction: Multi-layered ornate architectural frame. Features deep beveled inner edges, consistent premium materials, and horizontal/vertical symmetry. Incorporate soft atmospheric energy light-paths or neon-tubing nested within the frame structure.
reel_frame.corner_ornaments: ULTRA-DETAILED: Iconic symmetrical 3D sculptures or large glowing gems on all four corners. Must feature dramatic specular highlights and intricate decorative filigree that extends slightly into the frame segments.

symbol_splitting.icon_body: CRITICAL: No text or typography allowed. Pure 3D object/character rendering, centered composition, high-end material polish, shadow layer included for depth.
symbol_splitting.word_overlay: 3D Stylized Typography: Must match Theme DNA material (e.g. Aztec Gold). Beveled edges, high-gloss finish, slight perspective to match Icon Body, separate from object.
symbol_splitting.magic_layers: Atmospheric FX: High-quality translucent glows, floating particles, energy waves, or light beams. Must enhance the silhouette without obscuring the Icon/Word layers.

renderwolfStyles.classic-chinese: Classic Chinese Slot style, vibrant red and gold theme, ornate traditional patterns, high-gloss 3D textures.
renderwolfStyles.clay: Clay Slots style, handcrafted claymation aesthetic, soft matte textures, charmingly imperfect surfaces, playful 3D forms.
renderwolfStyles.polished-2d-toon: Polished 2D Toon Render style, crisp vector-like outlines, vibrant cell shading, high-end mobile game aesthetic.
renderwolfStyles.soft-volumetric-3d: Soft Volumetric 3D Cartoon style, puffy rounded forms, gentle ambient lighting, subsurface scattering effect, friendly toy-like appearance.
renderwolfStyles.pixel: Retro Pixel Art style, clean 16-bit aesthetic, deliberate square brush strokes, limited but punchy color palette, nostalgic game vibe.
